headline: Saturday snacking test: discipline over emotion, now.
summary: You're losing 0.26 kg/week but need 0.63 kg/week—Saturday snacking is eroding your momentum and your 360-day window to reach 88 kg.
details: Skip the emotional snacking trigger today by meal-prepping with Huel portions and keeping high-kJ vegan foods out of reach—Saturday is your weakness, so remove temptation now. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes today (non-negotiable), targeting the movement your sedentary work denies you. Today matters because you've gained 0.1 kg in the last week and you're 665 days behind—one Saturday of discipline compounds into next week's momentum, or one day of snacking starts a backward spiral.
